sections.title: A: Circle the correct word
sections.instructions: Choose the correct option in each sentence.

items.sentence: You don't need to go on a **diet / cure**. You're not fat!
**Chew / Chop** the meat into small pieces with a sharp knife.
What **infections / ingredients** do we need for this recipe?
**Stir / Slice** the soup with a wooden spoon.
If the grapefruit is too **sour / spicy**, add some sugar.
In **benefit / comparison** to me, you get lots of exercise!
Does this drink **limit / contain** any sugar?
Sam's in bed with **flu / cough**, so he's not going to school today.
Have you **suffered / recovered** from bad headaches for a long time?
You shouldn't **affect / ignore** the problem. See a doctor!

sections.title: B: Word formation
sections.instructions: Complete the sentences by changing the form of the word in capitals.

items.sentence: My skin is very ...... (SENSE), so I shouldn't stay out in the sun all day.
Do you want to come ...... (JOG) with me?
When I broke my arm, it was very ...... (PAIN), but now it doesn't hurt at all.
There are lots of ...... (MEDICINE) encyclopaedias on the Internet.
What's the best way to lose ...... (WEIGH)?
I put salt in the coffee by mistake! It wasn't ...... (INTEND)!
All the knives and forks are ...... (BEND). We'll have to buy some new ones.
My mum prefers cooking on a gas ...... (COOK).

sections.title: C: Key Word Transformation
sections.instructions: Complete each second sentence using the word given, so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence. Write between two and five words.

items.sentence:
I think I've gained a few kilos over the last few months! **on**
I think I've ...... a few kilos over the last few months!

You should reduce the amount of fast food you eat. **down**
You should ...... the amount of fast food you eat.

This milk isn't fresh, so I'll throw it away. **gone**
This milk ......, so I'll throw it away.

If I eat tomatoes, I get bad stomach problems. **allergic**
I ...... tomatoes; if I eat them, I get bad stomach problems.

I hope your mum recovers from her illness soon. **over**
I hope your mum ...... her illness soon.
If you heat water to 100 degrees, it ......
If I ...... more time, I would exercise every day.
She ...... ill if she doesn't get enough sleep.
If I had known about the party, I ...... .
If you don't eat healthily, you ...... overweight.
What ...... if you won a lot of money?
If she ...... harder, she would have passed the exam.
Unless you take regular exercise, you ...... fit.
He ...... the doctor if the pain gets worse.
If we ...... recycling, we would cause less pollution.
I ...... tired if I don't sleep enough.
She would have called if she ...... your number.
If I ...... you, I'd join a gym.
He wouldn't be so unfit if he ...... more sport.

sections.title: E: Complete the sentences
sections.instructions: Write one word in each gap.

items.sentence: She goes for a run every morning to ...... fit.
You should ...... a healthy diet if you want to feel better.
He broke his ...... playing football and had to go to hospital.
The doctor told her to ...... more water every day.
You should warm ...... before exercising to avoid injury.
She is a strict ...... – she never eats meat or fish.
He had to ...... with a knee injury for months.
You need to cut ...... on sugar if you want to lose weight.
She takes vitamin supplements to ...... her immune system.
He is in great physical ...... thanks to regular exercise.
It's important to get enough ...... every night.
She ...... a headache and had to lie down.
You should see a doctor if the symptoms ...... for more than a week.
